name: Tropical Orange Coconut Drops
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar, butter, eggs, baking powder, salt, vanilla extract, and orange extract. Beat at low speed until well mixed (about 1-2 minutes). Stir in flour and flaked coconut until well combined (about 2-3 minutes). Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto greased cookie sheets. Bake for 8 to 12 minutes, or until the edges are lightly browned. Remove immediately. Makes about 5 dozen cookies.
